iam:ServiceSpecificCredentialAgeDays.description: Filters access by the duration until the credential's expiration

iam:ServiceSpecificCredentialServiceName.name: iam:ServiceSpecificCredentialServiceName
iam:ServiceSpecificCredentialServiceName.description: Filters access by the service associated with the credential

iam:TemplateArn.name: iam:TemplateArn
iam:TemplateArn.description: Filters access based on the requested template ARN
